case_title: MARIANNE LIU VS. SCOTT VALENCIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE SERVED MAR-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, SCOTT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENCIA, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 83 MCALISTER STREET, #304, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA, SCOTT
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC.,585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF WITH COPY OF RENTAL AGREEMENT AND ORDER TO ADMIT THE COPY. EXHIBIT 4C TO DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, MARIANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENCIA, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED THE PREMISES ON APRIL 18, 2012 $5,889.68 RENT, $660.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,549.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
